case_title: NIALL KENNEDY VS. SAN FRANCISCO'S 747-751 NATOMA STREET OWNERS'

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR OCT-13-2021 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-02-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-02-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF NIALL KENNEDY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO'S 747-751 NATOMA STREET OWNERS' ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PIERS MCKENZIE, MANAGING AGENT AND JUILIAN MARTINEZ, MEMBER OF THE BOARD. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING, HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG PRESENTED DISCLOSURE, AND LITIGATE(S)DID NOT OBJECT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-02-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KENNEDY, NIALL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO'S 747-751 NATOMA STREET OWNERS' ASSOCIATION $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,565.00, SEE ATTACHED MC-025 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT SAN FRANCISCO'S 747-751 NATOMA STREET OWNERS' ASSOCIATION MAILED TO RESPONDENT KENNEDY, NIALL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT SAN FRANCISCO'S 747-751 NATOMA STREET OWNERS' ASSOCIATION TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT KENNEDY, NIALL SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-03-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff/Respondent Niall Kennedy appeared on his own behalf.
John P. Gill, Esq., appeared on behalf of Defendant/Appellant San Francisco's 747-751 Natoma Street Owners' Association.
This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.
Plaintiff/Respondent Niall Kennedy sworn and testified on his own behalf.
John P. Gill testified on behalf of Defendant/Appellant San Francisco's 747-751 Natoma Street Owners' Association.
Mr. Gill filed a trial brief on behalf of the Defendant/Appellant.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Plaintiff/Respondent's Group Exhibit 1: Documents.
Defendant/Appellant's Group Exhibit A: Binder of documents, case printout.
Appellant's and Respondent's exhibits are retained by the Court.
The matter is taken under submission.
Judge: Mary Wiss; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported. (305)
